mapper.sql: id, enterprise_id, name, unit_type, sub_category, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_unit WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM bs_unit WHERE id = #{id} AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_unit ( enterprise_id, name, unit_type, sub_category, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseId}, #{name}, #{unitType}, #{subCategory}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_unit
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, name = #{name}, unit_type = #{unitType}, sub_category = #{subCategory}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
